task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: Complete implementation meeting all rubric requirements: (1) RenameRequest struct in api/types.go with correct json tags (source/destination), (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go POSTing to /api/rename, (3) RenameHandler in server/routes.go with CopyModel, source deletion (Remove and RemoveLayers), 404 return for missing source, and 409 return for existing destination, (4) Route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) in GenerateRoutes, (5) CLI command with correct cobra setup using ExactArgs(2), (6) CLI RenameHandler calling client.Rename with proper request construction, (7) No test files modified. Implementation follows existing code patterns and is production-ready.
